name: Secret Six Samurai - Genba
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>影</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かげ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ゲンバ
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 of your banished "Six Samurai" monsters; add it to your hand. If exactly 1 "Six Samurai" monster you control (and no other cards) would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 of your banished "Six Samurai" monsters; add it to your hand. If exactly 1 "Six Samurai" monster you control (and no other cards) would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 of your banished "Six Samurai" monsters; add it to your hand. If exactly 1 "Six Samurai" monster you control (and no other cards) would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
